output.code:
import re, json, textwrap

path = '/mnt/data/file-3rGUNLSV7pUbRhCuZFokbB-text_to_analyse.txt'
text = open(path,'r',encoding='utf-8').read()

# Find all substrings within double quotes
quotes = [(m.start(), m.end(), text[m.start():m.end()]) for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text)]
len(quotes), quotes[:10]

for i,(s,e,content) in enumerate(quotes,1):
    span = text[s+1:e-1]
    context_start = max(0, s-120)
    context_end = min(len(text), e+120)
    print(i, s+1, e-1, span)
    print(text[context_start:context_end])
    print("------")

import json

entries = []
# from earlier quotes list (s,e,content) where content includes quotes
for idx, (s, e, qcontent) in enumerate(quotes, 1):
    span_start = s+1
    span_end = e-1
    span_text = text[span_start:span_end]
    # Determine type by context: check preceding tag "القرآن الكريم" vs "الحديث النبوي"
    # Find the index of last occurrence of those phrases before s
    idx_quran = text.rfind("**القرآن الكريم:**", 0, s)
    idx_hadith = text.rfind("**الحديث النبوي:**", 0, s)
    citation_type = "Aya" if idx_quran > idx_hadith else "Hadeeth"
    entry = {
        "span_start": span_start,
        "span_end": span_end,
        "span_text": span_text,
        "citation_type": citation_type,
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    }
    # Fill references when possible based on context around
    if citation_type == "Aya":
        # Try to capture the sura & aya label nearby e.g. (سورة لقمان: ١٣)
        # Search forward from e to next line that has (سورة
        tail = text[e: e+100]
        import re
        m = re.search(r"سورة\s+([^\):]+):\s*([0-9٠-٩]+)", tail)
        sura_name = None
        aya_num = None
        if m:
            sura_name = m.group(1).strip()
            aya_num_str = m.group(2).strip()
            # convert Arabic-Indic digits to int
            trans = str.maketrans("٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩", "0123456789")
            aya_num = int(aya_num_str.translate(trans))
        else:
            # Sometimes label may appear on same or previous line; search around
            context = text[max(0, s-100): min(len(text), e+100)]
            m2 = re.search(r"سورة\s+([^\):]+):\s*([0-9٠-٩]+)", context)
            if m2:
                sura_name = m2.group(1).strip()
                aya_num_str = m2.group(2).strip()
                trans = str.maketrans("٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩", "0123456789")
                aya_num = int(aya_num_str.translate(trans))
        if sura_name and aya_num is not None:
            entry["aya_reference"] = {
                "sura_name": sura_name,
                "sura_number": 31 if sura_name == "لقمان" else None,
                "aya_number": aya_num
            }
        else:
            entry["aya_reference"] = {}
    else:
        # hadith: parse "رواه البخاري: ١٠٠٩" etc later in the text after the quote
        tail = text[e: e+150]
        import re
        m = re.search(r"رواه\s+([^\s:]+):\s*([0-9٠-٩]+)", tail)
        collection = None
        hadith_num = None
        if m:
            collection_ar = m.group(1).strip()
            trans = str.maketrans("٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩", "0123456789")
            hadith_num = int(m.group(2).translate(trans))
            # Map collection name to English
            coll_map = {"البخاري": "Sahih Bukhari", "مسلم": "Sahih Muslim"}
            collection = coll_map.get(collection_ar, collection_ar)
        if collection and hadith_num is not None:
            entry["hadeeth_reference"] = {
                "collection_name": collection,
                "hadith_number": hadith_num
            }
        else:
            entry["hadeeth_reference"] = {}
    entries.append(entry)

json_output = {"citations": entries}
print(json.dumps(json_output, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":400,"span_end":449,"span_text":"وَأَنِ اعْبُدِ الْهَالِكِينَ الْمَلِكِ الْقَدِيرِ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"لقمان","sura_number":31,"aya_number":13},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":575,"span_end":764,"span_text":"أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ، اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ وَاعْبُدُوا مَنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ يَعْبُدُهُ أَحَدٌ قَبْلَكُمْ، وَكُلُّ شَيْءٍ يَعْبُدُهُ اللَّّهُ، وَإِنَّمَا الْعِبَادَةُ مَا أَحَبَّ اللَّهُ أَنْ يُعْبَدَ.","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih Bukhari","book_number":0,"hadith_number":1009},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":854,"span_end":911,"span_text":"وَلَا تَجْهَرْ بِصَوْتِكَ وَلَا تَسْتَعْجِبْ بِالْغُرُورِ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"لقمان","sura_number":31,"aya_number":19},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":1023,"span_end":1096,"span_text":"الْكَبِيرُ مَنْ كَبَّرَ الْقَلِيلَ، وَالصَّغِيرُ مَنْ صَغَّرَ الْكَبِيرَ.","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih Muslim","book_number":0,"hadith_number":1350},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":1187,"span_end":1218,"span_text":"وَلَا تُسْرِفْ فِي الْأَمْوَالِ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"لقمان","sura_number":31,"aya_number":19},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
